name: 50 MG Caspofungin Acetate For Injection
about: 50 MG Caspofungin Acetate For Injection is a liquid drug that is used to treat fungal infections in the body. It is an antifungal medication that works by preventing the growth and spread of fungus. This injection is given as per the doctors suggestion, and the dosage may vary depending on the severity of the infection. The medicine should be stored in a dry and cool place to maintain its effectiveness. This medication is manufactured in India and is available for export, supply, and trade.

faq.q: What is the drug used for?
faq.a: 50 MG Caspofungin Acetate For Injection is used to treat fungal infections in the body.
The injection is given as per the doctors suggestion and may vary depending on the severity of the infection.

faq.a: The medicine should be stored in a dry and cool place to maintain its effectiveness.

faq.q: What is the dosage of the injection?
faq.a: The dosage of the injection is 50 mg.
The medicine is manufactured in India and is available for export, supply, and trade.
